claim_text: Ajinomoto official ABF page defines ABF as interlayer insulation film for complex circuit substrates and high-performance CPUs.
Ajinomoto ASV Report 2025 describes HPC and generative AI as ABF demand drivers and shows a higher ABF layer/area index roadmap.
notes: Company report; roadmap language needs future validation.

claim_text: Ajinomoto FY24Q4 presentation says the Gunma ABF varnish facility was completed in March 2025 and plans about JPY25bn investment toward 2030.
notes: Company presentation; investment plan should be refreshed against later capex updates.

claim_text: Ibiden official product page describes IC package substrates, SAP fine wiring, micro-vias and applications including PC/data center MPU and AI/vehicle GPU.
Ibiden Ono Plant opening release says mass production starts from October 2025 primarily for AI server products and advanced IC package substrates for AI servers and networking.
Ibiden February 2026 release announces about JPY500bn electronics capex for FY2026-FY2028 and first-phase JPY220bn for high-performance IC package substrates.
Ibiden Q3 FY2025 Q&A says AI server IC package substrate demand exceeds capacity and cutting-edge SAP capacity could be short.
notes: Management Q&A; treat as company claim about tightness.

claim_text: AT&S official release says Kulim Malaysia is ready for HVM and supplies high-end IC substrates for AMD data center processors and other customers.
TrendForce says AI demand tightens 3nm/2nm advanced packaging and extends to substrates and materials.
TrendForce estimated global AI server shipments grow over 28% in 2026 and ASIC share expands.
TrendForce estimated eight major CSP capex above USD710bn in 2026 and broader ASIC deployment.
Nan Ya Plastics 2026 investor presentation says AI servers, HPC and high-speed networking boosted mid-to-high-end electronic materials and demand outpaced supply.
notes: Company presentation mirror; refresh against issuer source if needed.

claim_text: Digitimes reported Unimicron high-end AI GPU ABF substrate ramp and expected recovery into 2026.
Digitimes reported Kinsus revenue and product-mix uplift from AI GPU, CPU and ASIC demand as ABF substrate capacity comes online.
Morgan Stanley view via Investing.com argued ABF substrate AI-driven upcycle and AI-related end-market share could rise by 2030.
